notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 dgfp-3-rep2 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Single predicate isGfpAtomicKernelAlloc matches a GFP-taking kernel allocator called with GFP_ATOMIC literal; sleepable- and atomic-context name tests are inlined in the assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles and fires once on POC (tipc_bcast_init_buggy), silent on _fixed / tn* / fp*.
